blended.narrative: Pico Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 3.9" of snow, highs of 48°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
